sections.title: A Voice Cries Out
sections.author: Michael Joncas
sections.snippet: Console my people, the ones dear to me; speak to the heart of Jerusalem: the time of your mourning is ended now, the Lord of life will come.

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: O bless the Lord, my soul.

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: John said: One mightier than I is coming; he will baptize you with the Holy spirit and wire fire

sections.title: Come to the Water
sections.author: John Foley SJ
sections.snippet: O let all who thirst, let them come to the water. And let all who have nothing, let them come to the Lord: without money, without price. Why should you pay the price,  except for the Lord?

sections.title: Remembrance
sections.author: Matt Maher and Matt Redman
sections.snippet: Oh how could it be that my God would welcome me into this mystery. Say take this bread, take this wine, now the simple made divine for any to receive. By mercy we come to your table. By your grace you are making us faithful

sections.title: The Heart of Worship
sections.author: Matt Redman
sections.snippet: When the music fades, all is stripped away, and I simply come. Longing just to bring something that's of worth that will bless Your heart

sections.title: River of Glory
sections.author: Dan Schutte
sections.snippet: River of glory, springs of our birth, flood of God's riches poured on the earth. We are born from the darkness and clothed in the light! We are bathed in the glory of God!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
